error.InternalServerError: There are some errors on the server. Please try again later.
error.BadRequest: The request was invalid. Please check your input and try again.
error.Unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action. Please log in and try again.
error.Forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
error.NotFound: The requested resource was not found.
error.EmailAlreadyExists: The email address is already in use. Please use a different email.
error.InvalidEmailOrPassword: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
error.InvalidRefreshToken: The refresh token is invalid or expired. Please log in again.
error.UserNotFound: The user was not found. Please check your input and try again.
error.PasswordInvalid: The password does not meet the requirements. It must be at least 8 characters long, contain at least one uppercase letter, and include at least one special character.
error.OldPasswordIncorrect: The old password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
error.MemberNotFound: The member was not found. Please check your input and try again.
error.TeamNotFound: The team was not found. Please check your input and try again.
error.NotTeamMember: You are not a member of this team. Please join the team to access its resources.
error.TeamMinOneAdmin: A team must have at least one admin. Please assign another member as admin before removing the last admin.
error.TeamMinOneAdminTransferRole: You cannot remove the last admin of the team. Please transfer the admin role to another member before removing yourself.
error.InvalidRoleRequest: The role you requested is invalid. Please select a valid role.
error.OneMemberRequired: A team must have at least one member. Please add another member before removing the last member.
error.NoPermissionRemoveTeamMember: You do not have permission to remove this team member.
error.NoPermissionUpdateMemberRole: You do not have permission to update this member's role.
error.NoPermissionAddMemberRole: You do not have permission to add this member's role.
error.NoPermissionManageTeam: You do not have permission to manage this team.
error.NoPermissionChangePassword: You do not have permission to change this user's password.
